legal.termsSection1Desc: By accessing or using {{appName}}, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.
legal.termsSection2Desc: {{appName}} provides a financial management platform that allows users to track their assets, liabilities, and financial transactions. We may update, modify, or enhance the service at any time.
legal.termsSection3Desc: To use certain features of our service, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information and for all activities that occur under your account.
legal.termsSection4Desc: You retain all rights to your data. By using our service, you grant us a license to use, store, and process your data solely for the purpose of providing and improving our service.
legal.termsSection5Desc: Our Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. By using {{appName}}, you agree to our Privacy Policy.
legal.termsSection6Desc: {{appName}} is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of our service.
legal.termsSection7Desc: We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms of Service at any time without prior notice. We will notify you of significant changes through the service or other communication channels.
legal.termsSection8Desc: We may terminate your account if you violate these Terms of Service or engage in any activity that we determine to be harmful to our users or our operations.
legal.termsSection9Desc: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which our company is located.
legal.termsSection10Desc: If you have any questions or concerns about these Terms of Service, please contact us at {{supportEmail}}.
legal.privacySection1Desc: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, and financial data you choose to track in our service. We also collect certain information automatically when you use our service, including your IP address, browser type, and usage data.
legal.privacySection2Desc: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve our service, to communicate with you, and to personalize your experience. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
legal.privacySection3Desc: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.
legal.privacySection4Desc: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.
legal.privacySection5Desc: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information, such as the right to access, correct, or delete your data. To exercise these rights, please contact us at {{contactEmail}}.
legal.privacySection6Desc: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage patterns, and improve our service. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
legal.privacySection7Desc: Our service may contain links to third-party websites or services. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third parties.
legal.privacySection8Desc: Our service is not directed to children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
legal.privacySection9Desc: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.
legal.privacySection10Desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at {{contactEmail}}.

support.title: Support
support.contactFormDesc: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
support.subject: Subject
support.messageSent: Your message has been sent! We'll get back to you soon.
support.faqDesc: Find answers to common questions about {{appName}}.
support.faq1Answer: Yes! {{appName}} is completely free to use with no hidden fees or premium tiers. As an open-source project, we're committed to providing a high-quality financial management tool that everyone can access.
support.faq2: What does it mean that {{appName}} is open source?
support.faq2Answer: Being open source means that all of our code is publicly available for anyone to view, modify, or contribute to. This ensures transparency, security, and allows the community to help improve the application. You can find our source code on GitHub.
support.faq3: Do you store my financial data?
support.faq3Answer: Yes, your financial data is stored in MongoDB Atlas, a secure cloud database. We implement comprehensive encryption features for your protection including: encryption in transit (TLS), encryption at rest (AES-256), and optional encryption in use methods. Your sensitive data is always secured through all stages of storage and transmission.
support.faq4Answer: We welcome contributions from everyone! You can contribute by reporting bugs, suggesting features, improving documentation, or submitting code changes. Visit our GitHub repository to get started.
support.faq5Answer: Security is our top priority. We use MongoDB Atlas with multiple layers of encryption: TLS for data in transit, AES-256 encryption for data at rest, and advanced encryption capabilities for data in use. Our open-source nature means our security practices are transparent and continuously reviewed by the community.
